name: Claude Code Sandbox
postCreateCommand: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && HOST_KEY=$(echo "$HOST_WORKSPACE" | tr '/' '-'); CONTAINER_KEY=$(echo "$PWD" | tr '/' '-'); if [ "$HOST_KEY" != "$CONTAINER_KEY" ] && [ -d "$HOME/.claude/projects/$HOST_KEY" ]; then ln -sfn "$HOME/.claude/projects/$HOST_KEY" "$HOME/.claude/projects/$CONTAINER_KEY"; fi
